description_long: This is a small, single-story cabin with a prominent dark green gable roof and a stone foundation. The exterior walls are clad in a warm, wood-textured material, giving it a rustic appearance. The front facade features a single door and a polygonal window, while the opposite side has a single rectangular window. The long sides of the cabin are mostly solid, with one side featuring two large window openings and the other side being windowless. The roof has a significant overhang, providing some shelter to the windows and door below. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A small rustic cabin with a dark green gable roof, stone foundation, and wood-textured walls, featuring a front door and a mix of polygonal and rectangular windows.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the side with a single rectangular window and the gable roof's overhang clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the long side of the cabin with two large window openings beneath the roof overhang and a stone foundation.
description_view_2: The front of the cabin displays a centered door and a polygonal window to the left, both set above a stone base.
description_view_3: The opposite long side of the cabin is windowless, showing only the wood-textured wall and stone foundation beneath the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch and wide overhangs, covered in dark green material
attribute_window_arrangement: Three windows: one polygonal window on the front facade, one rectangular window on the rear, and two large rectangular windows on one long side, arranged asymmetrically
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly beneath the gable
